extortion.description: TIW Group consists of two related contracting entities: Tidewater Interior Wall and Ceiling, Inc. and Mid-Atlantic Painting, Inc., offering Class-A drywall and painting services since 1998 and 2002 respectively. They cater to builders and general contractors, providing high-quality, efficient, and timely residential and commercial services. With a strong focus on customer service and a well-seasoned staff, TIW Group ensures excellence in every project with a combination of drywall and painting applications.
